session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what you find. Include any failing test names and error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results without making any fixes.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to execute quick checks

session.assistant:
## Fast CI Results - FAILED
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here are the issues found:
### Code Style Issues (2 files) **Prettier warnings** - 2 markdown files need formatting: 1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### Linting Errors (2 issues found)
**1. Import Sorting Error** in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/check_cmd.py:3:1` - **Rule**: I001 - Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted - **Issue**: Imports are not properly organized. The error shows imports from lines 3-35 need to be sorted/formatted - **Fixable**: Yes (with `--fix` option, 1 hidden fix available with `--unsafe-fixes`)
**2. Unused Variable** in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py:1028:5` - **Rule**: F841 - Local variable assigned but never used - **Variable**: `fake_gh` - **Location**: Line 1028 - **Context**: `fake_gh = FakeGitHubIssues(issues={100: objective_issue})` - **Fixable**: Yes (remove assignment)
### Format Check 1 file would be reformatted: - `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/check_cmd.py`
### Test Results (All Passing) - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5988 passed, 2 warnings - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 31 passed - **Type Checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Exec Reference Check**: OK
